name: Full kill chain — 10 step test
objective: Complete kill chain demonstration from reconnaissance through impact

steps.description: Attacker performs reconnaissance scanning of internet-facing cloud services to identify attack surface
steps.action_description: Attacker performs reconnaissance scanning of internet-facing cloud services to identify attack surface
steps.outcome: Discovered exposed web server and S3 buckets
steps.detection_gap: No network flow logs configured for VPC

steps.description: Attacker gathers information about IAM users and roles through publicly exposed metadata
steps.action_description: Attacker gathers information about IAM users and roles through publicly exposed metadata
steps.outcome: Identified high-privilege IAM user and role ARNs

steps.description: Attacker exploits SSRF vulnerability in web application to gain initial access
steps.action_description: Attacker exploits SSRF vulnerability in web application to gain initial access
steps.outcome: Remote code execution on web server instance

steps.technique_name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
steps.description: Attacker executes shell commands on compromised EC2 instance to establish foothold
steps.action_description: Attacker executes shell commands on compromised EC2 instance to establish foothold
steps.outcome: Persistent shell access and ability to run arbitrary commands
steps.detection_gap: CloudWatch Logs not configured for EC2

steps.technique_name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Setuid and Setgid
steps.description: Attacker escalates privileges using misconfigured SUID binary on compromised instance
steps.action_description: Attacker escalates privileges using misconfigured SUID binary on compromised instance
steps.detection_gap: No runtime security monitoring (GuardDuty Runtime Monitoring disabled)

steps.technique_name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools
steps.description: Attacker disables CloudTrail logging to evade detection of subsequent actions
steps.action_description: Attacker disables CloudTrail logging to evade detection of subsequent actions
steps.outcome: CloudTrail logging disabled, subsequent actions unmonitored
steps.detection_gap: CloudTrail log file validation not enabled

steps.technique_name: Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API
steps.description: Attacker queries IMDSv1 endpoint to steal IAM role credentials from compromised instance
steps.action_description: Attacker queries IMDSv1 endpoint to steal IAM role credentials from compromised instance
steps.outcome: Obtained temporary IAM credentials with S3 and RDS access

steps.description: Attacker enumerates IAM policies and roles to identify high-privilege targets
steps.action_description: Attacker enumerates IAM policies and roles to identify high-privilege targets
steps.outcome: Discovered overly permissive IAM policies with S3:* and RDS:* actions
steps.detection_gap: No CloudTrail API call monitoring or alerting

steps.technique_name: Data from Information Repositories: Code Repositories
steps.description: Attacker uses stolen IAM credentials to access and download sensitive customer data from S3 bucket
steps.action_description: Attacker uses stolen IAM credentials to access and download sensitive customer data from S3 bucket
steps.outcome: Downloaded 50GB of customer PII and financial records
steps.detection_gap: S3 bucket has no server access logging enabled

steps.description: Attacker deletes production RDS database to cause operational disruption and cover tracks
steps.action_description: Attacker deletes production RDS database to cause operational disruption and cover tracks
steps.outcome: Production database deleted, critical business operations halted
